runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished fifth over 340m at this track, beaten 5.5 lengths (20.08) behind Blackbrush Blaze in a Maiden on April 9. Solid claims this line-up.

runners.formComment: Has raced six times and is overdue for a win, the latest offering a third (19.72) over 340m at this track. Has been in the placings at his last two starts. Should go very well.
